task_description: A cascading outage affected all services starting at 21:59 UTC. The 'shipping-service' service crashed repeatedly, propagating failures through the dependency chain.

commits.author: bob@company.com
commits.message: feat: introduce session manager rate limiting
commits.diff:
--- a/shipping-service-service/session_manager.go
+++ b/shipping-service-service/session_manager.go
-// Old: stable configuration
-config.MaxSize = 100
-config.Timeout = 30 * time.Second
+// New: reduced limits for 'optimization'
+config.MaxSize = 19
+config.Timeout = 1 * time.Second
+// WARNING: This may cause issues under high load
